steps.title: Use the essential clue
steps.content: The second sentence explains that ecosystems extend across the border and that actions on one side can affect the other side. It calls international cooperation essential, so the blank needs a verb showing that coordination is necessary.

steps.title: Choose necessity
steps.content:
• Choice B: "Praises" means expresses approval, not demands as necessary.
  • Choice C: "Reports" means states or describes, which is weaker than the necessity indicated by "essential."
  • Choice D: "Advises" means recommends, but the passage presents coordination as required.
The answer is A.
